name: Keio (Dead dove for a reason✌️)
description:
And looking more deeply into this character it's very easy to abandon, so yeah since it still sucked I'm fixing this creep again with anypov now, but now no longer a coach but a player.

I made this SPECIFICALLY for me so yeah high chance it will always get multiple updates on it, so as you chat this character you might notice a slight unusual thing to his behavior, like really unusual so it's basically because I have a thing for such stuff.
creator: Tomojogo
